elements.text:
You just experienced a lot of chorea while out in public. You fear that everyone around you saw it and is now judging you.

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: People are probably just concerned and wondering if they should offer their help.
People probably didn't even notice and went about their day as normal.
My arms might have been moving a lot, but they were by my sides where they weren't easily seen.
There may have been a bunch of people around me, but my chorea wasn't severe enough for it to be largely noticeable by people.
People saw me moving and thought I was acting crazy.
